plan.title: packs:slice v2 -- capture full body for every strategy

narratives.Description: Populate the `body` field for every strategy entry in the strategies pack (today only `yolo` has a non-null body), so the strategies pack carries the full text for all `strategies/*.md` and the renderer projects each one under the drift gate. This is sequential work because it regenerates every strategy markdown file as a drift-checked projection, a broad write surface that must be serialized against other pack edits.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Extend the `scripts/pack_migrate_strategies.py` migration script to capture the full body for every strategy into `packs/strategies/strategies-pack-0.1.json`, skipping pure redirect stubs.
2. Confirm `scripts/pack_render.py` renders each strategy body to its `strategies/*.md` projection and that `task verify:pack-drift` stays green.
3. Extend `tests/cli/test_pack_migrate_strategies.py` so every strategy body extraction and projection round-trip is asserted, not only the yolo proof.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent selecting a development strategy, I want every strategy body available from the strategies pack, so that I can load any strategy's full guidance from canonical JSON in one slice call.

items.title: every strategy body captured in pack JSON

narrative.Acceptance: The strategies pack JSON stores a non-null body for every non-redirect strategy entry, not only yolo.

items.title: renderer projects all strategy md drift-clean

narrative.Acceptance: Running `task verify:pack-drift` validates with no drift after the renderer regenerates every `strategies/*.md` projection.
Running `task packs:slice strategies by-trigger` returns full strategy bodies for matched strategies rather than null fields.

expected_outputs: Non-null body for every strategy in packs/strategies/strategies-pack-0.1.json
Regenerated strategies/*.md projections under the drift gate
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Framework-internal packs:slice v2 work traced to GitHub issue #1637; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies to maintainer tooling.

references.title: Issue #1637: feat(packs): packs:slice v2 -- remaining lessons slices + skills/rules/strategies pack surfaces
